system.benefit: Re-roll Psychic Phenomenon for 1d5 Corruption Points
system.description: The character has a special connection to the warp, allowing him to sense and avoid its less desirable effects as he channels its power. The character may not select this Talent if he has undergone the Rite of Sanctioning. When rolling for Psychic Phenomenon, the character may discard the die roll, gaining 1d5 Corruption Points, and then re-roll with no modifiers.
